channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Solar desalination breakthrough produces fresh water without toxic brine
item.description: Scientists have developed a solar desalination system that turns seawater into drinking water without creating environmentally damaging brine.

item.title: Tiny microbe inside fish may influence ocean health
item.description: A new discovery suggests that tiny microbes living inside fish may help shape the chemistry of the world's oceans.

item.title: Intermittent fasting triggers surprising changes in the brain
item.description: Losing weight may involve rewiring the gut and the brain at the same time. In a study of obese adults, an intermittent fasting-style diet led to significant changes.

item.title: The secret to pigeons' incredible navigation was hiding in their liver
item.description: Scientists have uncovered a surprising navigation system in pigeons: iron-filled immune cells in the liver that may act like tiny magnetic sensors.
